title: Add tests for scanner and safety rules
description: Create unit tests for manager detection, inactivity calculation, safe-target validation, and filter/sort behavior. Include regression tests for edge cases.
notes: Added scanner integration tests (manager lockfile priority, inactivity from git history, progress callback), expanded cleanup guard edge-case tests, extracted filter/sort into shared view-state module with behavior tests. Verified with yarn test (12 pass), yarn typecheck (pass).

title: Add manager-aware risk checks before cleanup
description: Add checks for zero-install and unsafe deletion scenarios (e.g., .yarn/cache committed, missing lockfile, unusual layouts). Surface confidence level and block unsafe actions by default.
notes: Implemented manager-aware cleanup safety assessment: blocks missing lockfile, unknown manager, and Yarn zero-install cache (.yarn/cache). Added risk level/confidence output in preview UI and enforced assessment-pending/unsafe block before confirm. Added regression tests for new risk scenarios. Verified with yarn test (15 pass), yarn typecheck (pass).

title: Add guarded cleanup action for selected repos
description: Implement actual cleanup execution in TUI with strict safety checks: require lockfile, only target node_modules, explicit typed confirmation, and per-repo audit log output.
notes: Implemented guarded cleanup in TUI: x opens dry-run preview, p runs dry-run audit, y enters typed confirmation token, Enter executes delete only after guard checks (lockfile + exact repo/node_modules path). Preserved manager-aware restore command display. Added deterministic tests in src/cleanup.test.ts for guard/token/dry-run behavior. Verified with yarn typecheck and yarn test (pass).

title: Create cleanup workflow state module for safety sequencing
description: Cleanup safety sequencing is split between cleanup.ts and index.tsx. Introduce a cleanup workflow module that models assess -> dry-run -> confirm -> execute states with explicit transitions and adapter-based delete execution. Keep deletion safety guarantees and add workflow state-machine tests.
close_reason: Obsolete: pre-Go (TypeScript) refactor tasks. MVP shipped in Go (#4–#11); track follow-ups on GitHub (#12–#14).

title: Consolidate invocation policy and remove shallow runtime wrappers
description: Apply deletion test to runtime wrappers. Remove pass-through wrappers that add no leverage (for example loadRuntimeConfig), and consolidate argv/root resolution policy into one authoritative module used by CLI, TUI, and debug entrypoints. Add tests for argv path matrix and '--' handling.
close_reason: Obsolete: pre-Go (TypeScript) refactor tasks. MVP shipped in Go (#4–#11); track follow-ups on GitHub (#12–#14).

title: Split scanner into traversal, metadata, and sizing modules
description: findReposWithNodeModules currently combines traversal, git probing, manager detection, inactivity, and sizing concerns in one implementation. Extract deeper modules for traversal, repo metadata composition, and size estimation, then compose behind a smaller scanner interface. Preserve behavior and improve test locality.
close_reason: Obsolete: pre-Go (TypeScript) refactor tasks. MVP shipped in Go (#4–#11); track follow-ups on GitHub (#12–#14).

title: Introduce scan session lifecycle module with event seam
description: Scan orchestration is split across runtime.ts and index.tsx callbacks. Create a scan session lifecycle module that emits normalized events (started, repoDiscovered, repoSized, cacheHit, completed) and isolates cache/filesystem adapters behind a seam. Ensure deterministic tests for event ordering and cache hit/full-scan behavior.
close_reason: Obsolete: pre-Go (TypeScript) refactor tasks. MVP shipped in Go (#4–#11); track follow-ups on GitHub (#12–#14).

title: Deepen UI mode controller and mode-aware help seam
description: Current UI mode handling in src/index.tsx is spread across large conditional branches, reducing locality and making mode behavior hard to test. Create a dedicated mode controller module and a mode-aware help/footer presenter seam so key hints and transitions come from one interface. Include transition tests for browse/search/workspace/preview/confirm flows.
close_reason: Obsolete: pre-Go (TypeScript) refactor tasks. MVP shipped in Go (#4–#11); track follow-ups on GitHub (#12–#14).

title: Polish UX and package as runnable CLI
description: Improve TUI ergonomics (better key help, pagination, selection actions), add README examples, and package binary/script entrypoint for easy local install.
notes: Completed UX polish and runnable CLI packaging: improved in-TUI ergonomics (incremental list, rescan key, mode/status, pagination window), added executable bin entrypoint (repo-cleanup-tui), and refreshed README run/examples/controls/safety docs. Verified with yarn test (20 pass) and yarn typecheck (pass).

title: Improve scanner performance and caching
description: Optimize recursive size calculation and repo discovery for large parent folders. Add optional cache file for previous scan results and invalidation strategy.
notes: Optimized scanner traversal and sizing: replaced queue.shift with index-based BFS, added du -sk fast path for node_modules size calc (with traversal fallback), expanded skip-dir pruning set. Added optional scan cache at root (.repo-cleanup-tui-scan-cache.json) with TTL and invalidation based on package.json/node_modules/lockfile mtimes. Added runtime cache tests. Verified with yarn test (17 pass), yarn typecheck (pass).

value: MVP scanner recursively finds git repos with package.json+node_modules, computes size, inactivity from git log, manager via lockfile
Scaffolded repo-cleanup-tui with Yarn 4 + TypeScript + Ink React TUI
Current tool is safe-preview only: no deletion; shows restore commands (yarn/pnpm/npm/bun) and filters/sorting in TUI
